# LoansForElectricians

> LoansForElectricians (loansforelectricians.com) — Matches electricians — union W-2 with overtime/per-diem and independent contractors — with licensed specialists for purchases, cash-out refinancing, and the Electrician HELOC. LoansForElectricians is an AdaptLend service (adaptlend.com) and is not a lender.

## Key facts

- Union/W-2 electricians: overtime, double-time, and consistent per-diem average into qualifying income when documented (YTD stubs + employer/union verification).
- Independent electricians qualify on 12–24 months of deposits or gross 1099s — van/tool write-offs never enter the math.
- The Electrician HELOC funds vans, gear, and licensing at home-equity pricing.
- 12 months self-employed with prior union W-2 history in the trade can be enough.
- Filling out the form does not affect credit; a credit check only happens if the borrower moves forward with a specialist.

## How it works

1. Answer a few plain-English questions (about two minutes, no credit check).
2. LoansForElectricians matches the borrower with a licensed specialist for this exact situation.
3. The specialist contacts the borrower within one business day; the match also arrives by email.
